creator: haraldei-freebsdbugz@anduin.net
text:
I realize this ticket is a bit old, but if there's still interest in getting IPv6 dual stack support working properly in OpenJDK 21, I can have a look at it.

I've submitted patches for Openjdk 22 and 23 to revert the offending patch, but did not get around to 21 yet.

https://github.com/battleblow/jdk22u/pull/1
https://github.com/battleblow/jdk23u/pull/5
